purpose: Wave 2 official local tax/public-fee Treasury IBAN destinations. Literal X in Treasury IBANs is accepted only via literal_x_iban=true.

rules.literal_x_iban: Used only for official Treasury IBANs where X is part of the published complete account, not a mask.
